article_title: Extension to direct delivery from off-site storage

briefs.title: BC Manufacturers' Direct Delivery from Off-Site Storage Extended to June 30, 2027
briefs.summary: BC's LCRB has extended the authorization allowing liquor and cannabis manufacturers to deliver directly to retail customers from on-site stores or registered off-site storage facilities until June 30, 2027.
briefs.action_required: Update your delivery operations to comply with Bulletin 25-03 and note the new expiry date of June 30, 2027.

key_dates.label: BC LCRB direct delivery from off-site storage authorization expires

briefs.article_title: Extension to direct delivery from off-site storage
